Article Title: T20 World Cup: From trump card to major concern? Varun Chakravarthy losing grip at the wrong time
Article Text:
Varun Chakravarthy of India celebrates with teammates after dismissing Jos Buttler of England during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 Semi-Final match between India and England at Wankhede Stadium on March 05, 2026 in Mumbai, India. (Photo by Prakash Singh/Getty Images)

NEW DELHI:

Suryakumar Yadav’s childhood friend backs him to win World Cup for India

Varun Chakaravarthy of India celebrates the wicket of Abrar Ahmed of Pakistan during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 match between India and Pakistan at R. Premadasa Stadium on February 15, 2026 in Colombo, Sri Lanka. (Photo by Robert Cianflone/Getty Images)

The good phase

Varun Chakravarthy of India bowls during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 match between India and Namibia at Arun Jaitley Stadium on February 12, 2026 in Delhi, India. (Photo by Prakash Singh/Getty Images)

The flat phase

Varun Chakravarthy of India unsuccessfully appeals for the LBW of Rovman Powell of West Indies during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 Super 8 match between India and West Indies at Eden Gardens on March 01, 2026 in Kolkata, India. (Photo by Pankaj Nangia/Getty Images)

Bethell storm hits Varun



Jacob Bethell of England bats during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 Semi-Final match between India and England at Wankhede Stadium on March 05, 2026 in Mumbai, India. (Photo by Prakash Singh/Getty Images)

Still a trump card?



Varun Chakravarthy of India celebrates the wicket of Shai Hope of West Indies during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 Super 8 match between India and West Indies at Eden Gardens on March 01, 2026 in Kolkata, India. (Photo by Pankaj Nangia/Getty Images)

Poll How concerned are you about Varun Chakravarthy's recent dip in form? Very concerned Somewhat concerned Not very concerned Not concerned at all

For the first half of the T20 World Cup, Varun Chakravarthy looked like India's biggest weapon with the ball. He was hitting the right notes, batters were struggling to read him and the wickets followed. But as the tournament has progressed, the mystery spinner's control has slipped. With his lengths going astray and runs flowing freely, his dip in form is an alarming sign for India ahead of the final against New Zealand, to be played at the Narendra Modi Stadium on Sunday.That concern grew after what happened in the semi-final against England at the Wankhede Stadium. The red soil pitch should ideally have suited the spinner, instead he went for plenty. His bowling figures read 4-0-64-1. Varun struggled to find the right length and it appeared that his confidence had also taken a beating, which is an area of concern for captain Suryakumar Yadav and coach Gautam Gambhir With 13 wickets to his name, Varun is currently the joint-leading wicket-taker of the 2026 T20 World Cup. In the first four matches, he picked up nine wickets with an impressive economy rate of 5.17. In the last four games, he has leaked runs at an economy rate of 11.63 while picking up just four wickets.Overall, Varun has been hard to go after when he has pitched the ball in the good length area while trying to attack the stumps.In 118 balls where he has hit that good length, he has conceded only 128 runs at an economy rate of 6.50 and also picked up 10 wickets.Whenever he has gone full or bowled short, basically when he has erred in hitting that 5 to 6 metre length, he has bowled bled runs. In the 27 balls where he has attempted to bowl full, he has conceded 66 runs at an economy rate of 14.66. The short of good length area has cost him 50 runs off 22 balls at 13.63.Now let us divide Varun's numbers into two phases, pre-South Africa and post.Before India's first Super Eight match against South Africa, Varun was a batter's nightmare. He bowled 51 balls in that good length area and conceded only 37 runs and picked up seven wickets. Even the fuller and shorter lengths did not cost him much, and his economy rates read 7 and 5.25, respectively.After the Namibia match at the Arun Jaitley Stadium, where he picked up 3 for 7 in two overs, Varun had spoken about his new variations and the ones he was working on."I have worked on my overspin rather than sidespin and more speed and zip off the wicket," he told reporters in the ICC mixed zone."I have been working on a few things, but that has been my process all along. I have always had some deliveries coming up, so I will always have something coming up. But it is up to me. It is actually about whether I am courageous enough to try it in the next match, but it depends."There are a few balls that just clicked for me in the matches and there have been a few variations which I have been trying for the last six years that did not come out earlier. So it just depends on the complexity of the delivery," he added.It is also worth noting that in the group stage India had played three Associate teams - USA, Namibia and the Netherlands. The match against Pakistan, in Colombo, was played on a two paced surface.In the first four games, Varun's bowling figures were 1/24 against USA, 3/7 against Namibia, 2/17 against Pakistan and 3/14 against Netherlands. In the next four matches, his figures read 1/47 against South Africa, 1/35 against Zimbabwe, 1/40 against West Indies and, most recently, 1/64 against England.In the 96 balls Varun bowled in the three Super Eight matches and the semi-final, he conceded 186 runs and picked up four wickets. Out of those four wickets, three came when he tried to hit the stumps from a good length. He conceded 91 runs off 67 balls at an economy rate of 8.14. Meanwhile, in the 29 deliveries where he tried something different by bowling fuller or shorter, he was sent for plenty. In 15 full deliveries, Varun conceded 52 runs, and in 14 shorter length balls he leaked 43 runs.England came prepared against Chakravarthy and he was not allowed to settle into any rhythm by centurion Jacob Bethell, who smashed him for three sixes in his opening spell. Chakravarthy was guilty of bowling either too short or too full. Bethell smashed Chakravarthy for 42 runs off just 13 balls on his way to a special hundred, albeit it couldn't steer them into the final.On the eve of the contest at the Wankhede Stadium, former India cricketer Dinesh Karthik , replying to a TimesofIndia.com query during a JioStar media day, had said that Varun had shortened his length to extract more bounce. Karthik had expected Varun to do well at the Wankhede."First up, statistics tell you that Varun has shortened his length. When somebody shortens their length, you need to understand why they could have done it. It could also mean that he has bowled a couple of fuller balls which have gone for boundaries. In trying to readjust his length and pull it back, he has probably gone shorter."So with Varun, the fact that he has been playing on pitches that probably did not have as much bounce means that at times he has gone slightly shorter to try and get the ball to bounce up. Or probably he has bowled so much on the stumps and wants to attack them a lot more," said Karthik."He has tried to pull the length back a bit because people tend to play what is called a step hit from the crease. So maybe he has gone slightly shorter to avoid getting step hit. But yes, can he bowl a little fuller and challenge the batter? I feel he is very capable of doing it. Has he gone slightly shorter? Statistics do tell you that he has pulled his length back a bit," he added.After the 2024 T20 World Cup, when Gambhir took charge, Varun found a new lease of life. Under Surya and Gambhir, he emerged as India's trump card and has picked up 70 wickets in 38 matches so far. He was also instrumental in India's 2025 Champions Trophy triumph, where he picked up nine wickets in three games.Meanwhile, India vice-captain Axar Patel has defended the under fire world number one bowler."We have talked about it. We have played a lot of knockout games at this moment, so it is very important to have the right mindset. Yes, there is skill and everything, but what we tell him is that when you go for runs, do not change your plan even if the batter is targeting you," Axar said in the mixed zone."You have a plan to put the ball on the stumps first, and then suddenly you change the line. Yes, there could be mistakes in pressure situations. We keep telling him that he is the X factor and that he should trust himself. When it comes to bowling, it is all about confidence."If you look at it, even after being hit for a few sixes, he got the wicket of Jos Buttler. He is the number one T20 bowler and he knows what he is doing. It is a matter of mindset. We have one more match and maybe he will deliver a match winning performance in the final," added Axar.Varun's dip in form may have raised questions, but he is no stranger to bouncing back from difficult times. The 34-year-old has built his career on resilience and has often found ways to respond when the pressure is at its peak. The final now offers him that opportunity.Against a formidable New Zealand side, India will look to their mystery spinner not just for wickets but also for control in the middle overs. If Chakravarthy can rediscover his rhythm and trust his plans, Sunday night could yet become the stage for another compelling comeback story.
Article Summary: Varun chakravarthy looked like india's biggest weapon with the ball in the first half of the t20 world cup. But as the tournament has progressed, the mystery spinner's control has slipped. With his lengths going astray and runs flowing freely, his dip in form is an alarming sign for india ahead of the final against new zealand.

Article Title: Maxx Crosby Ravens: Maxx Crosby Contract Update: Baltimore Ravens likely to rework $29M deal after landing star pass rusher
Article Text:
Maxx Crosby Ravens contract will likely be restructred (Imagn Images)

Baltimore Ravens expected to revisit Maxx Crosby deal after blockbuster trade

The Maxx Crosby Ravens era began with a strong start, but the focus swiftly shifted to his contract. Baltimore landed the star defensive end in a blockbuster trade with the Las Vegas Raiders earlier this week. Now the big question centers on whether the team will tweak the Maxx Crosby contract it inherited.Crosby still carries a lucrative deal signed with Las Vegas in 2025. However, reports suggest Baltimore could restructure parts of it soon. With the pass rusher market climbing fast, this partnership may include a financial reset before the 2026 season kicks off.The discussion of the Maxx Crosby contract gained traction on March 8, when Mike Florio addressed the situation in an Instagram reel posted by Pro Football Talk.“I suspect there will be an adjustment, and I suspect that the Ravens are smart enough to know you need to have something ready to go,” Florio said in the March 8 Instagram video. “It needs to be pre-negotiated, and you get it done not long after Max Crosby officially becomes a member of the Ravens.”Baltimore paid a massive price to land Crosby. The Baltimore Ravens reportedly sent multiple first-round picks, including selections in 2026 and 2027, to the Raiders to secure one of the league’s most disruptive defenders.The trade alone signals urgency from Baltimore. The team finished the 2025 season with an 8-9 record and missed the playoffs. Their pass rush also struggled badly. The defense produced only 30 sacks, the franchise’s lowest total in 15 years.That context explains why the Ravens targeted Crosby. Since entering the NFL in 2019, Crosby has built one of the most consistent pass-rushing resumes in football. He has recorded 69.5 sacks, more than 130 tackles for loss, and around 360 quarterback pressures during that span. He also produced four double-digit sack seasons and earned five Pro Bowl selections.Baltimore inherited the remaining years of the three-year, $106.5 million extension Crosby signed with the Raiders in 2025. Some seasons in the deal yield payouts of nearly $29 million. At the time, the agreement briefly made him the highest-paid non-quarterback in the league. The market has moved quickly since then. Elite edge rushers such as Micah Parsons and T. J. Watt continue to push the ceiling higher. Because of that shift, Baltimore may restructure the deal with new guarantees or incentives.For the Ravens, the goal looks simple. Secure Crosby long-term while keeping the roster competitive. If the team finalizes an updated Crosby contract, it will mark the next step in Baltimore’s aggressive push toward the 2026 playoffs.
Article Summary: Baltimore ravens expected to revisit maxx crosby deal after blockbuster trade. Baltimore landed the star defensive end in a blockbuster trade with the las vegas raiders earlier this week. Now the big question centers on whether the team will tweak the contract it inherited.crosby still carries a lucrative deal signed with las vegas in 2025.

Article Title: Suryakumar Yadav: 'Jhooth bol raha hai': India skipper Suryakumar Yadav hits back at Mitchell Santner's claim ahead of IND vs NZ final
Article Text:
India vs New Zealand

Can India erase bad memories in Ahmedabad with T20 World Cup title? Pressure will be key!

A day before the T20 World Cup final, the usual tension and mind games between teams have already started. India and New Zealand are set to clash for the title, and both captains had a few things to say during their pre-match press conferences.India head into the final with strong momentum after smashing 253/7 against England in the semifinal at the Wankhede Stadium. But New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner believes the key for his team is to stop India from posting another huge total.Speaking ahead of the match, he said, "And at the end of the day, if it's going to be flat like it was the other night, trying to restrict India to 220 instead of 250 might give us a good chance."When India captain Suryakumar Yadav was asked about Santner’s comment, he responded with a smile and a bit of banter."Jhooth bol raha hai (he's lying). We will try to bat well. If we score 225 or 250, it will be good. But sometimes the wicket is different, and we have to play differently. We don't predict from the dressing room that we have to score so much. Whatever the pitch demands, we have to play that way," he said.Santner also spoke about the pressure India might feel while playing a final at home in front of a packed crowd. "That's the goal - to silence the crowd - but there are a lot of challenges in cricket, and they are variable.I think there is a lot of pressure on India to win at home," he said. At the same time, the Kiwi captain sounded confident about his team. "I am pretty excited. We have played here before. There are no secrets to it. The boys are buzzing for tomorrow. It is a one-game shootout. The boys are excited."Santner’s remark reminded many of Pat Cummins’ famous comment before the 2023 ODI World Cup final about silencing the crowd. Suryakumar couldn’t resist poking fun at that as well, saying: "Sab hi same line chipka rahe hai. Kuch toh naya bolo (Everyone is now saying the same thing. Come up with something new)."
Article Summary: New zealand captain mitchell santner believes the key for his team is to stop india from posting another huge total. Santner also spoke about the pressure india might feel while playing a final at home in front of a packed crowd. India captain suryakumar yadav responded with a smile and a bit of banter.

Article Title: 'Lost to Australia in 2023': Shoaib Akhtar says Ahmedabad pressure will haunt India in T20 World Cup final vs New Zealand
Article Text:
File photo/Agencies

All eyes on how India handle pressure and pitch vs West Indies | T20 World Cup 2026

Akhtar, Gul speak about pressure on India



Former Pakistan cricketers Shoaib Akhtar and Umar Gul have spoken about the pressure on India ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026 final against New Zealand, pointing to the expectations of a large fan base and India’s recent results at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. India will face New Zealand in the final on Sunday (March 8) at the venue.India had suffered a 76-run defeat to South Africa during the Super 8 stage of the tournament at the same ground, a result that pushed them close to elimination before they recorded wins against Zimbabwe and the West Indies. India had also lost the 2023 ODI World Cup final to Australia at the Narendra Modi Stadium.The venue, which can accommodate 132,000 spectators, has also drawn attention due to the atmosphere during major matches and India’s results there in recent tournaments.This has led to talk among some observers that Ahmedabad has not been favourable for India in big games.Referring to these factors, former Pakistan fast bowler Shoaib Akhtar said India’s record at the Narendra Modi Stadium and the expectations of fans could create pressure during the final."If the wicket at Ahmedabad grips and if it’s favourable for spinners, the par score will be around 200 or 175. Safe score would be 200 plus only.Now, will New Zealand be able to score 250 or 225 against India? If they do, India will be under a lot of pressure," Shoaib Akhtar said on Game on Hai show."It’s also clear as daylight that India will also come full prepared. I feel New Zealand may get bogged down in front of India, but India also have pressure of 1.5 billion people. They have already lost a match at Ahmedabad to Australia in the World Cup final."Akhtar, however, said India remain the favourites for the title but added that New Zealand winning the tournament would also be good for the sport."I see India as the winner out of all this, but for cricket’s sake, it’s high time New Zealand should win this World Cup."Former Pakistan pacer Umar Gul, who was part of the same discussion, said the expectations around the home side could add to the pressure during the final."New Zealand bowling attack appears stronger. India can be under pressure due to the home team’s big population," Gul said. "New Zealand recently won a series in India (Test series). They have experience with spin track, and India may also think that these guys played well against us and defeated us. New Zealand will have confidence. It will be a good final."India reached the final after defeating England in the semi-final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai on Thursday.
Article Summary: Former pakistan cricketers shoaib akhtar and umar gul have spoken about the pressure on india ahead of the t20 world cup 2026 final against new zealand. They pointed to the expectations of a large fan base and india’s recent results at the narendra modi stadium in ahmedabad.

Article Title: Shane Bieber’s wife Kara’s playful comment on Alex Bregman’s wife Reagan’s Houston photos sparks buzz
Article Text:
Alex Bregman with his family (Image via: IG/X)

Shane Bieber’s wife Kara Bieber reacts with a playful comment after Reagan Elizabeth shares Houston photos celebrating Team USA’s arrival



Alex Bregman reflects on returning to Houston while representing Team USA in the World Baseball Classic

The World Baseball Classic has brought fresh excitement to Houston as Team USA prepares to begin its pool play games in the city. Among the players returning to a familiar place is Alex Bregman, who spent the first part of his Major League Baseball career with the Houston Astros before moving on to the next chapter of his journey. While fans are focused on the star filled roster competing in the international tournament, a social media post from Bregman’s wife Reagan Elizabeth has also caught attention online.Reagan recently shared a set of photos on Instagram while visiting Houston. The pictures showed her posing against the city skyline while wearing a patriotic American flag themed jacket. Along with the photos, she wrote, “Back in Houston for Team USA.”The post quickly drew reactions from followers and other baseball families including Shane Bieber's wife Kara, who later left a playful comment.The moment soon turned into a friendly exchange in the comments section. Shane Bieber’s wife Kara Bieber reacted to the post with an enthusiastic message, writing, “OK!!!! she's representing 👏.” Reagan replied with heart emojis, keeping the interaction light and cheerful as fans joined in celebrating the Team USA moment.Reagan Elizabeth’s Instagram post quickly gained attention among fans following updates around the World Baseball Classic.Many followers praised the patriotic jacket and the excitement of being in Houston as Team USA begins its tournament run. Some fans pointed out that Houston remains closely connected to Alex Bregman’s baseball story.While Reagan’s post created buzz on social media, Alex Bregman himself spoke about how meaningful it feels to return to Houston. The third baseman spent the first nine seasons of his MLB career with the Astros and helped the team win two World Series titles during that time. Now back in Houston as a member of Team USA, Bregman said the experience brings back many memories.“It feels great to be back here,” said Bregman, who left as a free agent for Boston two years ago and now plays for the Cubs. “Obviously a lot of great memories here. I look forward to doing so with the Stars and Stripes on my chest.”Bregman is appearing in his second World Baseball Classic after previously playing in the 2017 tournament. He missed the 2023 edition while recovering from a finger injury. “It’s exciting to be in the WBC,” Bregman said. “It’s an honor to represent our country. We’re all extremely proud to be a a part of this team.” As Team USA begins its games in Houston, the city once again becomes part of Bregman’s baseball journey while he looks to create new memories wearing the Stars and Stripes.
Article Summary: Alex bregman's wife reagan elizabeth shared photos on instagram celebrating team usa's arrival in houston for the world baseball classic. Shane bieber’s wife kara bieber reacted to the post with an enthusiastic message, writing, “ok!!!! She's representing 👏”

Article Title: Tom Brady: “Don’t want any smoke with the NFL”: Logan Paul’s $1M challenge to Tom Brady sparks unexpected reaction from his own podcast partner
Article Text:
Logan Paul’s $1M challenge to Tom Brady sparks unexpected reaction from his own podcast partner (Getty)

Mike Majlak publicly distances himself from Logan Paul’s Tom Brady challenge



Logan Paul sparked fresh sports drama this week after issuing a $1 million boxing challenge to several NFL players, including seven-time Super Bowl champion Tom Brady. The social media star-turned-WWE performer claimed that no football player could defeat him in a boxing ring.The challenge quickly spread across sports media and social platforms. However, the most surprising reaction came from inside Paul’s own circle. His Impaulsive podcast co-host, Mike Majlak, publicly distanced himself from the situation and made it clear that he does not want to get involved in a fight with NFL players.Mike Majlak addressed the situation on March 6, 2026, in a post on X. While fans treated the feud as entertainment, Majlak took a different tone, joking that he had no interest in picking a fight with NFL stars.“Just to be clear, the views expressed by my podcast co-host are his views and his views alone,” Majlak wrote on X on March 6, 2026. “I personally don’t want any smoke with the NFL or its affiliates, including but not limited to Tom Brady or Puka Nacua. Logan will be hearing from my lawyers.”He followed the statement with another line that showed the post was laced with sarcasm. “I have just been told that we actually have the same lawyers, so they will be hearing from themselves,” Majlak added in the same post on X.The exchange arrived after Logan Paul made his bold claims during a recent episode of his Impaulsive podcast. Speaking during the show, Paul argued that professional football players rely on athleticism rather than fighting skill, which, in his view, would give him the advantage inside a boxing ring.“Not a single football player could beat me in a boxing match, that is on God,” Paul said on the Impaulsive podcast earlier this week. “I would throttle Myles Garrett, Puka Nacua, Tom Brady, Sam Darnold, doesn’t matter.”Paul then raised the stakes with a financial challenge. “A million dollars, you come to the gym, you put up boxing gloves, we see how it goes. There are levels to this,” he said during the same podcast conversation.Soon after the episode broke the internet, several NFL players reacted publicly. Buffalo Bills OL Dion Dawkins, LB Tae Crowder, guard Brock Hoffman, and Chiefs tackle Kingsley Suamataia all showed interest in the challenge on social media. However, Paul later responded on X and claimed none of the players accepted his exact terms. He said the offer required a $1 million escrow from both sides and a private fight at his gym in Puerto Rico with official referees and judges.As of now, the situation remains a war of words rather than a real fight. Still, Majlak’s reaction added an unexpected twist. While Logan Paul appears eager to test himself against NFL athletes such as Tom Brady, his own podcast partner has already made one thing clear. He wants no part of the smoke.
Article Summary: Mike majlak publicly distances himself from logan paul’s $1m challenge to tom brady. Paul issued a $1 million boxing challenge to several nfl players, including brady. The social media star-turned-wwe performer claimed that no football player could defeat him in a boxing ring.

Article Title: Cody Rhodes becomes new Undisputed WWE Champion on SmackDown; will face Randy Orton at WrestleMania 42
Article Text:
Image via WWE

Cody Rhodes battled Drew McIntyre for the Undisputed title on WWE SmackDown

The March 6 episode of Friday Night SmackDown concluded with a high-stakes main event match between Drew McIntyre and Cody Rhodes for the Undisputed WWE title. The match was made after McIntyre interfered in the Men's Elimination Chamber last Saturday to cost Rhodes his chance to head to WrestleMania 42. However, as the dust settled on this highly anticipated showdown, it was The American Nightmare who emerged victorious and will now head to The Show of Shows to battle the chamber match winner, Randy Orton.Cody Rhodes walked into the match knowing that it was his last chance to be a part of a major title showdown at WrestleMania 42. At the same time, Drew McIntyre was laser-focused on putting Rhodes in his rearview for good.As the match started, McIntyre attempted to leave the match, but Rhodes caught up to him, and he began to lay punches. The duo returned to the ring to begin the bout in full force. McIntyre was visibly enraged and ready to inflict major damage in The American Nightmare.He had the upper hand on Rhodes for a brief while. He began to attack him on the outside of the ring, and Rhodes found it difficult to escape his wrath, as McIntyre inflicted damage on his back.The action returned to the ring, and The Scottish Warrior continued to dominate Rhodes. However, he regained control with his quickness and delivered a Cody Cutter. Rhodes tried to deliver a Cross Rhodes but McIntyre rolled out of the ring and began to overpower him again. After that, the match became a back-and-forth contest with both superstars going up against each other.As the match approached its end, McIntyre planted Rhodes with a Powerbomb through a table outside the ring and then hit a Cross Rhodes on Cody, but he kicked out of the pin. Cody then hit a Claymore Kick, but Drew survived the pinfall. After that, the referee was accidentally taken out. The bout finally came to an end when Jacob Fatu came and stopped McIntyre from using the chair. This allowed Rhodes to hit a combination of the Cody Cutter and Cross Rhodes to win the Undisputed WWE title.Also read: WWE 2K26: All active Locker Codes (March 2026)
Article Summary: Cody rhodes battled drew mcintyre for the undisputed title on wwe smackdown. The match was made after mcintyre interfered in the men's elimination chamber last saturday to cost rhodes his chance to head to wrestlemania 42. The american nightmare will now head to the show of shows to battle randy orton.

Article Title: Fortnite updates: Cyberpunk collaboration Wave 2, skins, release date, and more
Article Text:
Image via Fortnite

Everything we know about Fortnite x Cyberpunk 2077 Wave 2



"Good morning, Night City! We've got a surprise for you."

Fortnite x Cyberpunk 2077 Wave 2 release date



Fortnite has a legacy as one of the best metaverses in gaming history, which can be credited to the massive roster of crossovers that take place. Over the years, Epic Games has only collaborated with popular film franchises, shows, and even gaming universes.One of the iconic partnerships to have taken place is with CD Projekt Red’s Cyberpunk 2077, which brought Night City to the game. In a recent announcement, Epic Games has confirmed that the crossover is returning, and this marks the Wave 2 of Cyberpunk 2077 in Fortnite.You can expect a variety of cosmetic items to make their way into the battle royale experience, including outfits for popular characters. The section below provides all the known news regarding Fortnite x Cyberpunk 2077 Wave 2.After the success of Wave 1, which introduced Johnny Silverhand and the female version of V to Fortnite, fans had been waiting for other popular characters from the game. To much delight, the official teaser posted by the Epic Games Store confirmed that Wave 2 is on its way and will be arriving very soon.Essentially, the post read,This has left the door wide open for fan-favorite characters to debut.Among the rumored skins is the Male V variant, which fans have been heavily requesting.Furthermore, there is strong speculation that Wave 2 will end up introducing Adam Smasher to the battle royale experience. He is among the most popular characters and is Arasaka’s ruthless cyborg mercenary and rival to Morgan Blackhand.There are also rumors that the wave could end up featuring characters from the Cyberpunk 2077: Phantom Liberty expansion.At the time of writing, no exact release date is known for the Fortnite x Cyberpunk 2077 Wave 2 collaboration. However, there are chances that this Wave 2 will arrive following the upcoming release of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2.The recent announcement has also ignited discussions about the hit anime spin-off, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and fans of the same are hopeful that Epic Games will also introduce a collaboration with it. If this crossover takes place, it will pave the way for David Martinez and Lucy to drop onto the island.This was all you needed to know about the Fortnite x Cyberpunk 2077 Wave 2 collaboration.
Article Summary: Fortnite x cyberpunk 2077 wave 2 is set to arrive in the near future. Epic games has confirmed that the crossover is returning. This marks the wave 2 of cyber punk 2077 in fortnite. There are rumors that the wave could end up featuring characters from the cyberpunk: phantom liberty expansion.

Article Title: IND vs NZ T20 World Cup final: What happens if rain washes out Ahmedabad clash?
Article Text:
Ahmedabad: Kajal, a worker, sprinkles water while cleaning seats at the Narendra Modi Stadium (PTI Photo/Gurinder Osan)

India leave Mumbai for Ahmedabad | Team India heads to T20 World Cup final vs New Zealand

Poll Should the ICC consider making changes to the Super Over rules? Yes, it should be adjusted No, the current format is fine

NEW DELHI: India will face New Zealand in the T20 World Cup 2026 final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday, with Suryakumar Yadav's side aiming to create history by defending their title.India reached the summit clash after beating England in the semifinal and became the third team after Pakistan and Sri Lanka to make back-to-back T20 World Cup finals.However, New Zealand remain a tough opponent and have never lost to India in their previous T20 World Cup meetings.With such a big match ahead, fans are also curious about what happens if weather or other situations affect the final.According to ICC rules, the organisers will first try to complete the match on the scheduled day, even if the game has to be shortened due to rain.If the match cannot be completed that day, a reserve day is in place.The game will continue from the same point where it stopped rather than starting again.However, if rain prevents any result even after the reserve day, both teams will be declared joint winners of the tournament.Another possibility is the match ending in a tie.In that case, the winner will be decided through a Super Over, where both teams get one extra over to bat and bowl.If the Super Over also ends in a tie, another one will be played.This rule was introduced after the controversial finish of the 2019 ODI World Cup final. Earlier, only one Super Over was played and if it was tied, the team that hit more boundaries won. Now, Super Overs will continue until a clear winner emerges.
Article Summary: India will face new zealand in the t20 world cup 2026 final at the narendra modi stadium in ahmedabad on sunday. Suryakumar yadav's side aiming to create history by defending their title. India reached the summit clash after beating england in the semifinal and became the third team after pakistan and sri lanka to make back-to-back finals.

Article Title: India vs New Zealand Live Streaming: When and where to watch IND vs NZ T20 World Cup final live online and on TV?
Article Text:
India vs New Zealand

T20 World Cup Final: Greenstone Lobo predicts India vs New Zealand winner | Astrological analysis

Where to watch IND vs NZ T20 World Cup 2026 final in India



NEW DELHI: India will take on New Zealand in the T20 World Cup 2026 final on Sunday at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, with Suryakumar Yadav’s side aiming to create history by becoming the first team to win the tournament three times and also defend the title successfully. The high-stakes clash will be played in front of more than 100,000 fans at the stadium and millions watching worldwide.India reached the final after a thrilling seven-run semifinal win over England. Despite a brilliant century from Jacob Bethell, India held their nerve thanks to Jasprit Bumrah’s exceptional death bowling.Reflecting on the pressure ahead of the final, captain Suryakumar Yadav admitted the challenge but remained confident."There will definitely be pressure and nerves, especially playing in India and going for the title," he said. "But the boys and the whole support staff are excited as well."He also praised Bumrah’s match-winning spell in the semifinal. "We all know what he's capable of and what he's done for India over the years. He did the same thing again today, raised his hand and showed character to pull the game away from them. It was a special bowling performance."However, New Zealand will not be easy opponents. The Black Caps reached the final after a dominant nine-wicket win over South Africa, powered by Finn Allen’s stunning 33-ball century. Allen warned that his side has the confidence to challenge the hosts. "We've got a lot of momentum going into the weekend," he said. "I think if we play our best cricket we can beat anybody."New Zealand’s top order, including Tim Seifert and Allen, has been in excellent form. Allen praised his opening partner after their semifinal stand. "I just looked to play almost a support role to Tim," he said. "He's in incredible form, he's an incredible player and I think he's just showing the world what he can do. I think that makes it easy for me to sit back and have the best seat in the house."Fans can watch the match live on Star Sports Network channels on television. The live streaming will also be available on the JioHotstar app and website in India. Fans can also follow the live updates on TimesofIndia(dot)com.
Article Summary: India will take on new zealand in the t20 world cup 2026 final on sunday at the narendra modi stadium in ahmedabad. The match will be played in front of more than 100,000 fans at the stadium and millions watching worldwide. India reached the final after a thrilling seven-run semifinal win over england.

Article Title: Bad Bunny turns to Shohei Ohtani dominance vs Chinese Taipei after Team Puerto Rico loses dramatic WBC insurance battle
Article Text:
Bad Bunny and Shohei Ohtani (Image Via Getty)

Shohei Ohtani’s grand slam headlines Japan’s 13-0 win while Bad Bunny continues showing strong support for Kiké Hernández and Team Puerto Rico

The opening game of the 2026 World Baseball Classic in Tokyo quickly turned into a one-man show. Japan crushed Chinese Taipei 13-0 at the Tokyo Dome, but the biggest reason fans kept cheering all night was Shohei Ohtani . The Japanese superstar hit a powerful grand slam and finished the game with five RBIs, helping Japan start its title defense in dominant fashion.Many famous faces were sitting in the crowd to watch the moment live, including global music star Bad Bunny and Hollywood actor Timothée Chalamet. Bad Bunny arrived in Tokyo as a proud supporter of Puerto Rico’s team, but inside the stadium it became impossible not to watch Ohtani. His huge swing in the second inning changed the entire mood of the game and quickly became the moment everyone was talking about.Japan’s offense exploded early in the game. The team scored ten runs in the second inning, which became one of the biggest innings in World Baseball Classic history.The rally began with aggressive hitting from the top of the lineup, but the loudest moment came when Shohei Ohtani launched a grand slam deep into the stands.The blast pushed Japan to a comfortable lead and completely changed the pace of the game. By the time the seventh inning arrived, Japan was still ahead by double digits. Because the tournament uses a mercy rule, the game officially ended early with Japan winning 13-0.Shohei Ohtani finished the night 3-for-5 with five RBIs. He was only a triple away from hitting for the cycle. Fans inside the Tokyo Dome stood and cheered as he rounded the bases after the grand slam, and the moment quickly spread across social media.Among those watching from the stands was Bad Bunny, who has been very vocal about supporting Puerto Rico in the tournament. Even though he attended the Tokyo game, his loyalty to Puerto Rico’s national team has been clear throughout the event.The singer partnered with Adidas to design special BadBo 1.0 cleats for Puerto Rico players. The shoes were created using the colors of the Puerto Rican flag. Several players proudly showed them online, including Kiké Hernández, Edwin Díaz, and José De León.Hernández shared photos of the cleats on Instagram so fans could see the gift from the global music star. The gesture helped highlight the strong connection between Puerto Rico’s baseball team and one of the island’s biggest celebrities.Bad Bunny also tried to help the roster before the tournament even started. According to reports from ESPN, the singer offered to personally cover the insurance costs needed for star players Francisco Lindor and Carlos Correa so they could participate in the World Baseball Classic.However, the official insurance provider did not approve the coverage. Reports suggested Lindor’s previous elbow procedures and Correa’s contract situation made the approval difficult. Because of that decision, both players had to stay out of the tournament.Even though the plan did not work, the move showed how strongly Bad Bunny wanted to support Puerto Rico’s team. Still, on opening night in Tokyo, the spotlight clearly belonged to Shohei Ohtani, whose grand slam turned Japan’s first game into a powerful statement.
Article Summary: Shohei ohtani hit a grand slam and finished the game with five rbis. Japan crushed chinese taipei 13-0 in the opening game of the 2026 world baseball classic. Bad bunny has been very vocal about his support for puerto rico.

Article Title: Eileen Gu: Olympic champion Eileen Gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged Raya dating profile after Winter Olympics
Article Text:
Olympic champion Eileen Gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged Raya dating profile after Winter Olympics (Image Via Getty Images)



Eileen Gu’s alleged Raya dating profile sparks online buzz after winter olympics

Eileen Gu is once again trending online, but this time it is not only because of her skiing. The 22-year-old freestyle skier, who won three medals at the Winter Olympics, has caught the attention of fans after internet users claimed they found her dating profile online. Soon after her Olympic success, a post on X started spreading quickly. The post showed what looked like Eileen Gu’s profile on Raya, a private dating app often used by celebrities and public figures.Within a short time, the post crossed more than four million views, as many fans shared their reactions and curiosity. Gu, who was born in San Francisco and competes internationally in freestyle skiing, won gold in the women’s halfpipe event and silver medals in slopestyle and big air.While her performance at the Winter Olympics made headlines worldwide, the internet is now buzzing about whether the Olympic star might also be looking for love.The viral post on X showed a photo of what appeared to be Eileen Gu’s profile on Raya. Raya is a members-only dating app that is mostly used by celebrities, influencers, and people from the entertainment and sports world.The image shared online showed a glamorous picture of Gu looking over her shoulder.The bio on the profile read: “Pro skier and model, Stanford university. 2x Olympic gold medalist & model w IMG. I like cats & philosophy & white truffle oil & running & physics.”However, it is important to note that the authenticity of the profile has not been confirmed. There has been no official statement from Eileen Gu or her representatives about whether the account is real.Gu has been a major name in international skiing since the Beijing Winter Olympics. The American-born athlete chose to compete for China, the country of her mother’s birth, which created debate at the time. Some critics questioned her decision, but Gu explained her reasons openly.In a message she shared on Instagram, Gu wrote, “When I was 15, I announced my decision to compete for China. I am forever grateful for that season, and continue to maintain a close relationship with the team.”She also explained her goal behind the decision. Gu wrote, “Skiing for Team China meant the opportunity to uplift others through the universal culture of sport, and to introduce freeskiing to hundreds of millions of people who had never heard of it.”Looking back at her journey, she added, “I can look back now, at 22, and tell 12-year-old Eileen that there are now terrain parks full of little girls, who will never doubt their place in the sport.”For now, the viral Raya profile remains only an online mystery. But one thing is clear, whether it is on the slopes or on social media, Eileen Gu continues to capture the internet’s attention.
Article Summary: Olympic champion eileen gu goes viral as internet sleuths claim they discovered her alleged raya dating profile after winter olympics. The 22-year-old freestyle skier, who won three medals at the winter olympics, caught the attention of fans after internet users claimed they found her dating profile online.

Article Title: Florida Panthers: Seattle Kraken Interested in Florida Panthers' Mackie Samoskevich Ahead of Trade Deadline
Article Text:
Despite a struggling season, the Panthers are reportedly fielding trade interest for young forward Mackie Samoskevich from the Seattle Kraken. While Samoskevich's scoring has dipped, Florida values his potential and defensive growth, demanding a significant return. Seattle, with ample draft capital and a Michigan connection to Samoskevich, could be a suitor, though Shane Wright is off the table.

What acquiring Mackie Samskevich means for the Florida Panthers

Things haven’t been going well for the Panthers this season. With a 30-29-3 record, their playoff window has all but closed. With less than 20 games remaining, the franchise has been fielding calls about their pending unrestricted free agents for weeks.But a new name has surfaced in trade discussions that has nothing to do with veterans on expiring deals. Sportsnet's Elliotte Friedman reported that the Seattle Kraken are interested in acquiring winger Mackie Samoskevich from the Panthers.The 23-year-old forward hasn't generated the offensive numbers Florida hoped for in his second season, but the organization still views him as a core piece going forward. Florida intends to make Seattle pay a steep price if any deal materializes.The Panthers aren't eager to move a former first-round pick who is still developing, especially one that coach Paul Maurice has praised repeatedly for his defensive growth and ability to create chances with his speed. Samoskevich has scored just six goals and 21 points in 60 games this season.Moreover, his 4.7 percent shooting percentage tells the story of a player who can't buy a goal right now. He's actually generating more chances than his rookie year, firing 2.15 shots per game compared to 1.8 last season.The puck just isn't going in.That represents a steep drop from his first full NHL campaign, when he notched 15 goals and 31 points in 72 games for the two-time defending Stanley Cup champions. The underlying numbers suggest the scoring drought is unsustainable rather than a sign of regression.If any team can meet Florida's asking price, it's Seattle. The Kraken owns multiple first-round picks over the next two drafts, including two acquired from Tampa Bay in last year's Bjorkstrand and Gourde deal. They also have five second-round selections and a deep prospect pool to work with.There's a Michigan connection worth noting, too. Samoskevich and Kraken center Matty Beniers were college teammates at the University of Michigan. Reuniting the two could give Seattle a familiar partnership to build around.Friedman also noted that Shane Wright will not be included in any Samoskevich deal. The Kraken continue to discuss Wright separately in talks centered on acquiring an elite scorer or a younger talent needing a fresh start.Samoskevich becomes a restricted free agent after this season and is arbitration-eligible. With no chance of postseason hockey, Florida remains a potential seller of expiring contracts but is protective of controllable young assets like Samoskevich.
Article Summary: Mackie samoskevich has scored just six goals and 21 points in 60 games this season. Florida values his potential and defensive growth, demanding a significant return. Seattle, with ample draft capital and a michigan connection, could be a suitor, though shane wright is off the table.

Article Title: Geno Smith Release: “God is the greatest”: Geno Smith reacts to sudden release from Las Vegas Raiders
Article Text:
Image - X

Raiders Release Geno Smith: Full Contract Details and 2026 Salary Cap Impact



The Minnesota Vikings:

The New York Jets:

The Pittsburgh Steelers:

In the NFL , the "Quarterback Carousel" never truly stops spinning, it just changes speed. Today, it hit high gear as the Las Vegas Raiders officially released veteran Geno Smith. While some fans were blindsided, Geno’s reaction on social media was anything but shocking. His reaction started a full blown debate on the platform with many supporting him and wishing more for his future.Tweeting, “God is the GREATEST. THANK U LORD,” Smith signaled that he’s ready for his next chapter, even if the one in Vegas ended with a bit of a thud.The timing isn't a coincidence. NFL contracts are often built like ticking time bombs. By releasing Geno today, the Raiders avoid an $8 million roster guarantee that would have kicked in next week.While they still have to eat roughly $18.5 million in dead money, saving that $8 million gives them much-needed breathing room to rebuild a roster that struggled significantly last season.The real reason Geno is packing his bags? The Raiders are officially on the clock. With the No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 Draft, Las Vegas is widely expected to select Indiana standout Fernando Mendoza.When you have the chance to grab a franchise-altering rookie on a cheap contract, veteran bridge quarterbacks usually become "expendable."After a 2025 season where Geno was sacked 55 times and led the league in interceptions, the Raiders' front office decided it was time to stop patching the leak and start building a new house.Geno Smith is 35, but in a league starved for competent quarterback play, he won’t be unemployed for long. He is the ultimate "resilience" story, and several teams are already being linked to him:They need a veteran presence to challenge and mentor J.J. McCarthy.A potential homecoming? The Jets are reportedly looking for multiple veterans to stabilize their locker room.Mike Tomlin loves veteran poise, and Geno could provide a high-floor insurance policy for their current room.Geno Smith has spent his career being counted out, from his early days in New York to his "they wrote me off, I didn't write back" Pro Bowl era in Seattle. While his Vegas stint was underwhelming, his upbeat reaction suggests he already knows where his next phone call is coming from.The Raiders are betting their future on a rookie, and Geno is betting on himself, again.
Article Summary: Geno smith tweeted, “god is the greatest. Thank u lord,” smith signaled that he’s ready for his next chapter, even if the one in vegas ended with a bit of a thud. By releasing geno today, the raiders avoid an $8 million roster guarantee that would have kicked in next week.

Article Title: Josh Berry Net Worth 2026: What is Josh Berry's net worth in 2026? A look at Ford's star racers' businesses and investments
Article Text:
Josh Berry (Image credits: Getty Images)

Josh Berry's net worth and earnings in racing in 2026

Josh Berry's endorsements, sponsors & life off the track

For Josh Berry, the road to the NASCAR Cup Series was not the traditional fast-track path. The Tennessee native made his name grinding in the short tracks before ascending to the top level of racing in the world of NASCAR. In 2025, he stepped into one of the most historic rides, driving the No. 21 Ford for Wood Brothers Racing, a partnership sponsored by Ford Motor Company. As he started to do better in the races and sponsors began to follow, Berry's financial profile started to grow, adding to his reputation in the garage.By 2026, Berry's estimated net worth is around $5 million, built primarily from NASCAR contracts, prize money, and sponsorships accumulated during his climb from Late Model racing to the Cup Series.A huge financial boost came when Berry had a multi-year opportunity with Wood Brothers Racing. According to industry estimates, under his Cup Series contract, his base salary is in the $1 million to $2 million range annually, excluding race bonuses and team prize distributions.Berry's first Cup Series win in 2025 boosted his market value, owing to his performance bonuses and increased the driver's appeal to sponsors, especially with many teams with historic brand power, such as the Wood Brothers organization.Before reaching the pinnacle of stock car racing, he spent years dominating short track racing and became the winning driver in CARS Tour history, a record that helped establish him as one of the most respected grassroots talents in the sport.Like many emerging stars in the sport of NASCAR, Berry's financial development is closely linked to sponsorships. Over the years, Berry has been tied to brands such as SUNNYD, Tire Pros, Bass Pro Shops, Jarrett Companies, and LubeZone, including manufacturer backing as tied to Ford. Off the track, Berry leads a decidedly down-to-earth life compared to many high-profile athletes. He lives in North Carolina with his wife Ginny, a healthcare professional, and their young daughter.For Berry, the financial success came after his rise in the sport of racing, a product of years of persistence. From running outside of racing in the early part of his career, to leading the field in one of the most historic Fords in the history of the sport, his story shows how consistent performance and the right sponsorship support can lead to a steady rise from short-track racer to long-track Cup Series success story.
Article Summary: By 2026, berry's estimated net worth is around $5 million, built primarily from nascar contracts, prize money, and sponsorships accumulated during his climb from late model racing to the cup series. Under his cup series contract, his base salary is in the $1 million to $2 million range annually.

Article Title: LIV Golf Stars issue a bold honest reality check on Brooks Koepka’s replacement
Article Text:
LIV Golf Stars issue a bold honest reality check on Brooks Koepka’s replacement

Graeme McDowell discusses the new captain of Smash GC



Brooks Koepka’s exit from LIV Golf sent shockwaves through the golf world. LIV Golf was not the only one impacted; Smash GC and its team were also affected due to this. Since the upcoming season was on the horizon, the Saudi-backed league needed to appoint a new captain for the team, and Talor Gooch got that opportunity. A veteran team member has expressed his feelings.“Yeah, for sure. Again, 36 holes left times four. What's that, 144 holes? So there’s a lot of golf. That’s two tournaments’ worth of experience. Four scores to count every day. It’s very volatile. Smash is up there. Riyadh and Australia: we didn’t really finish the job. Gooch is a great player. This is a good golf course for him as well,” Graeme McDowell responded to reporters at LIV Golf Hong Kong when asked about Talor Gooch’s captaincy and helping him win his first team title.“Like I say, I have a lot of work to do this weekend, but one of the great things about LIV is it’s not just about yourself. Golf is an incredibly individual sport, but when you’re going for that sort of team victory as well, it’s a lot of fun and really that little extra motivation.”Talor Gooch became the new captain of Smash GC when Brooks Koepka left LIV Golf to rejoin the PGA Tour. Gooch has been part of the Saudi-backed league since 2022.In 2023, he was the individual champion. However, it’s the first time he is leading a team. And as a team captain, victory is something he has yet to achieve. As McDowell noted in his response, this team factor also plays a significant role in inspiring LIV golfers. Yet, he is aware that there are two more rounds left, so he can’t celebrate yet.Smash GC has been performing suitably under its new captain. It placed 6th in the team ranking at the 2026 LIV Golf season opener in Riyadh. With 20-under par, Jason Kokrak led with the most points for the team; following him were Graeme McDowell, Talor Gooch, and Harold Varner III, with scores of 14-under par, 10-under par, and 8-under par.Then at the 2026 LIV Golf Riyadh, the team scored 41-under par to finish at 7. This time, it was Graeme McDowell contributing the most with a 16-under par score. Both Jason Kokrak and Harold Varner III scored 9-under par, while captain Gooch scored 7-under par.However, this time the team has a chance to win at the 2026 LIV Golf Hong Kong. After the first two rounds, with a 35-under-par score, it is now leading the scoreboard midway. Both Graeme McDowell and Harold Varner III have assisted the 10-under for the team. Following Smash GC is Joaquin Niemann’s Torque GC, which has gathered a 30-under-par score.
Article Summary: Talor gooch became the new captain of smash gc when brooks koepka left liv golf to rejoin the pga tour. The saudi-backed league needed to appoint a new captain for the team, and gooch got that opportunity. After the first two rounds, with a 35-under-par score, it is now leading the scoreboard midway.

Article Title: Madison Beer: Justin Herbert’s PDA on Madison Beer’s birthday post melted the entire fandom
Article Text:
(Image via Getty Images)

Madison Beer Turns 27: Justin Herbert, Hailey Bieber , and More Celebs Celebrate the Pop Star



"Happy birthday to my favorite person of all time.

I love you so much. You’ve changed my life forever."

The NFL ’s most private quarterback just threw the ultimate touchdown for love! Justin Herbert and Madison Beer have officially taken their romance from "sideline rumors" to "Instagram official," and fans are absolutely swooning.On Thursday, pop princess Madison Beer celebrated her 27th birthday with a series of stunning photos featuring a tiara, a pink "It’s my birthday" ribbon, and a classic pepperoni pizza. While the birthday girl looked flawless, it was the top comment that truly broke the internet.Breaking his usual "football-only" social media rule, the Los Angeles Chargers star dropped a simple but soul-stirring two-word comment: “My love.” If that wasn’t enough to send the "Beer-berts" (we’re working on the ship name) into a frenzy, Justin followed up with a rare, heart-melting Instagram Story spree. He shared a black-and-white photo of the two at a stadium with a caption that raised the bar for boyfriends everywhere:The comment section wasn’t just a win for the Chargers, it was a total girl-power moment, too. Fashion icon and close friend Hailey Bieber stopped by to share the love, commenting “birthday angel” under Madison’s post. Between Justin’s heart-melting confession and Hailey’s sweet shout-out, it’s clear that Madison is surrounded by a pretty elite defensive line of her own this year!While they’ve kept things relatively low-key, the pair has actually been dating for about seven months.Their love story first sparked back in August 2025, when eagle-eyed fans spotted the 6'6" quarterback visiting Madison on the set of her music video.By October, the romance was undeniable. They were seen sharing a sweet kiss on the sidelines of a Chargers game, and later went viral at a Lakers game when Justin reflexively blocked a rogue basketball from hitting Madison, proving he’s a protector both on and off the field!It’s a massive year for both stars. Madison just released her third studio album, Locket, in January and is currently preparing for her global tour. Meanwhile, Justin is heading into the NFL offseason with a new lease on life (and a lot of "lover boy" energy).From Madison rocking Chargers gear in the stands to Justin calling her his "GOAT" (literally, he posted a photo of her feeding goats with that caption), this duo is quickly becoming the gold standard for sports-meets-pop-culture pairings.
Article Summary: Justin herbert and madison beer have officially taken their romance from "sideline rumors" to "instagram official" the los angeles chargers star dropped a simple but soul-stirring two-word comment: “my love” hailey bieber stopped by to share the love, commenting “birthday angel”

Article Title: Alysa Liu: Olympic champion Alysa Liu issues urgent plea to fans after frightening airport incident following her historic Milan Winter Olympics gold
Article Text:
Olympic champion Alysa Liu issues urgent plea to fans after frightening airport incident following her historic Milan Winter Olympics gold (Image Via Getty Images)

Alysa Liu asks fans for personal space after airport incident as Olympic champion adjusts to sudden fame

Alysa Liu made history at the Milan Winter Olympics. The 20-year-old American figure skater won gold with a stunning free skate to Donna Summer’s “MacArthur Park.” Her victory ended a 24-year drought for U.S. women in Olympic figure skating. But soon after returning home, Alysa Liu faced a moment that left her shaken. The Olympic champion took to Instagram Stories and asked fans to respect her personal space after a troubling situation at the airport.According to E! News, Liu said a group of people surrounded her with cameras and even chased her toward her car when she landed. The moment was very different from the cheerful welcome she received earlier.Despite the scary experience, Liu’s Olympic win has made her one of the most talked about athletes in the country. Fans have celebrated her everywhere she goes, but the young skater says she still hopes to keep her life calm and private while adjusting to sudden fame.Alysa Liu shared her concerns directly with fans on social media after the airport incident. On Instagram Stories, she wrote, “So I land at the airport & there’s a crowd waiting at the exit with cameras & things for me to sign.All up in my personal space. Someone chased me to my car bruh. Please do not do that to me.”The message surprised many fans because Liu is usually known for her warm and cheerful personality. During competitions and interviews, she often smiles, jokes with fans, and interacts kindly with the crowd.Since returning from the Milano Cortina Olympics, her schedule has been very busy. After winning the women’s figure skating final on February 19 in Milan, Liu quickly became one of the biggest stars in the sport.When she landed at San Francisco International Airport, people gathered to welcome her home. Airport staff even gave her gifts, and Delta flight attendants made a special announcement on the plane.They said, “Ladies and gentlemen, today we welcome home a true champion after representing us with courage, dedication and excellence. Please join me in celebrating our gold medalist, Alysa Liu, who brought home the gold from the Olympic Games.”Her week after returning from Italy has been packed with appearances. Liu visited New York City for several media events. She appeared on Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen and also visited the Today show.During the visit to the Today show, she had a special fan moment when she met actor Daniel Radcliffe. She also went to the Lyceum Theatre to watch Simu Liu perform in the play Oh, Mary! and later appeared on the cover of Teen Vogue.Even with all the celebrations, Liu has said that privacy is very important to her. In February, she told E! News, “I want my life to stay as similar as possible every way and no one has thought that it would, but I’m really going to try to keep my peace because I like my life.”She added, “I don’t want it to be too chaotic. I want it to stay calm and peaceful and chill. Honestly, I would say privacy. Privacy for sure. Privacy is a big one.”Sadly, this is not the first time Liu’s privacy has been affected. In 2022, before the Beijing Winter Olympics, the Associated Press reported that Liu and her father Arthur Liu were targeted by individuals connected to a foreign spy operation.According to reports, several people were found surveilling the Liu family in the months leading up to the Games. At the time, her father spoke strongly about protecting his daughter. He said, “This is her moment. This is her once in a lifetime opportunity to compete at the Olympic Games.”Arthur Liu also said he would not allow anyone to prevent her from attending and would do everything possible to ensure her safety. Even as Alysa Liu celebrates one of the most significant moments of her career, the young Olympic champion continues to ask the public for one simple thing: respect for her personal space.
Article Summary: Olympic champion alysa liu issues urgent plea to fans after frightening airport incident following her historic milan winter olympics gold. The 20-year-old american figure skater won gold with a stunning free skate to donna summer’s “macarthur park” her victory ended a 24-year drought for u.s. women in olympic figure skating.

Article Title: Who could be the 5 prospects to crack MLB Opening Day rosters? Konnor Griffin, Carson Benge headline the race
Article Text:
Konnor Griffin and Carson Benge (Image Via Getty)

Konnor Griffin could reach the majors quickly with the Pittsburgh Pirates

JJ Wetherholt has a clear opportunity with the St. Louis Cardinals

Carson Benge could take advantage of an opening with the New York Mets

Justin Crawford’s speed keeps him in the Philadelphia Phillies conversation

Ryan Waldschmidt quietly building a strong case with the Arizona Diamondbacks

Every spring training brings the same question in Major League Baseball: which young prospects will earn a place on the Opening Day roster. Teams closely watch their rising talents during this time, and strong minor league performances often create real opportunities. This year, players like Konnor Griffin, JJ Wetherholt, Carson Benge, Justin Crawford, and Ryan Waldschmidt are drawing attention and could push for their MLB debuts if they impress during spring training.Shortstop Konnor Griffin is widely viewed as one of the most exciting young talents in baseball. The Pittsburgh Pirates prospect finished last season strongly in Double-A, hitting .337 with five home runs and six stolen bases in 21 games.What makes Griffin’s situation even more interesting is his age. He will not turn 20 until April, which means he could reach the majors at a very young age if Pittsburgh decides to promote him quickly.The Pirates’ roster situation may also help his chances. The team does not have strong competition at shortstop, which could give Griffin a real opportunity to win the job during spring training.Second baseman JJ Wetherholt may have one of the clearest paths to an Opening Day roster spot.During the offseason, the St. Louis Cardinals moved several key infielders, including Brendan Donovan and Nolan Arenado.Those changes created space in the Cardinals’ infield, and Wetherholt appears well positioned to take advantage of it.He performed well in Triple-A last season. In 47 games, Wetherholt hit .314 with 10 home runs and nine stolen bases, showing both power and speed. If he continues producing like that during spring training, he could quickly earn a spot on the roster.Outfielder Carson Benge may benefit from how the New York Mets shaped their roster during the offseason.The Mets made several moves in their infield but added only Luis Robert Jr. to their outfield group. That decision leaves room for a new player to step into a larger role.Benge struggled briefly in Triple-A, but his performance in Double-A was impressive. In 32 games, he hit .317 with a .407 on-base percentage and a .571 slugging percentage. If he continues that form during spring training, the Mets could give him a chance to take the left field job.Outfielder Justin Crawford brings one skill that every team values: speed.The Philadelphia Phillies prospect hit .334 in Triple-A last season and stole 46 bases, showing how dangerous he can be once he reaches base.Crawford’s hitting style is a little unusual. Nearly 60 percent of his batted balls were ground balls, meaning he depends heavily on speed rather than power. Even so, the Phillies only added Adolis García to their outfield depth this offseason, which keeps Crawford firmly in the Opening Day conversation.Outfielder Ryan Waldschmidt may not yet be a widely known name, but his numbers suggest he could surprise people this season.The Arizona Diamondbacks prospect hit .309 with a .423 on-base percentage in 66 Double-A games last season. He also showed strong discipline at the plate, nearly walking as often as he struck out.Arizona recently moved on from outfielders Jake McCarthy and Blaze Alexander, which created additional space on the roster. Because of that situation, Waldschmidt could find himself competing seriously for a place on the Diamondbacks’ Opening Day lineup.
Article Summary: Konnor griffin, jj wetherholt, carson benge, justin crawford, and ryan waldschmidt could push for their mlb debuts if they impress during spring training. Griffin will not turn 20 until april, which means he could reach the majors at a very young age if pittsburgh decides to promote him quickly.
